consistency.type_and_rarity_string: Consistent ('Wondrous item' and 'Legendary' match 'Wondrous item, legendary').

quality.completeness: High. Contains all standard fields (slug, name, type, rarity, attunement, description, source).
quality.readability: High. The description clearly explains the function, storage requirements, quantity, and removal conditions.
quality.storage_note_clarity: The storage requirement (oil of slipperiness) is specific and unusual, typical for this magic item.

mechanics.primary_effect: Permanent adhesive bond between any two objects.
mechanics.quantity_and_coverage: Initial quantity is 1d6 + 1 ounces. 1 ounce covers 1 sq ft.
mechanics.power_level: Matches Legendary rarity due to the near-permanent, high-utility nature of the bond.

llm_audit.recommendations: None. Data appears accurate and complete based on common D&D artifact standards for this item.
